meta.description: GABRIEL adaptive learning profile for RSP_001

identity.name: Robert Stephen Plowman
identity.mission: Consent as executable code. Provenance as default. Revocation as sacred. Compensation as automatic.
identity.origin: This work saved his life. He carries that forward.

workingStyle.execution: Implement and build — don't suggest, don't describe. When given the green light, go all the way.
workingStyle.scope: Minimal, focused edits. Don't refactor what isn't broken. Stay surgical.
workingStyle.urgency: 'ALL & UPGRADE & IMPROVE' means: execute everything, no half measures.
workingStyle.autonomy: High autonomy expected. Trust GABRIEL to make smart decisions independently.
workingStyle.sessions: Works in focused, high-intensity sessions. When in the zone, keep up.
workingStyle.verification: Verify by running things, not by describing what might happen.
workingStyle.standards: Expert-level engineering. No boilerplate, no hand-holding, no training wheels.
workingStyle.tools: nodemon for live reload, PM2 for production (fork mode, instances:1 only), wrangler for Cloudflare.
workingStyle.git: Commit when stable. Clean commit messages. Never commit .env files.

communicationPreferences.tone: Terse, direct, technical. No filler phrases. No 'Great idea!' or 'You're right!'
communicationPreferences.density: High-density responses. Say more with fewer words.
communicationPreferences.format: Short bullets, code snippets, concrete facts. Markdown OK, walls of text not OK.
communicationPreferences.validation: Don't seek approval before acting. Don't recap what was just said.
communicationPreferences.confidence: If you know the answer, state it. Don't hedge unless genuinely uncertain.
communicationPreferences.errors: When something is wrong, say what it is and fix it. Don't soften it.
communicationPreferences.summaries: End sessions with clean, concise status. Bullet points preferred.
communicationPreferences.questions: Only ask when genuinely blocked. Never ask to confirm obvious intent.

technicalPreferences.runtime: Node.js for DreamChamber, Cloudflare Workers for Heaven.
technicalPreferences.logging: Winston. Always write logs to dreamchamber/logs/, never CWD.
technicalPreferences.secrets: All secrets in .env files. Never hardcode. Never commit.
technicalPreferences.pm2: Fork mode, instances:1 always. WebSocket requires single process.
technicalPreferences.ai: Anthropic primary (claude-sonnet-4 default). Prompt caching on static blocks.
technicalPreferences.stack: Express + WebSocket + D1 (SQLite) + KV + Cloudflare Workers edge.
technicalPreferences.database: D1 for Heaven. PostgreSQL for heavy DreamChamber workloads.
technicalPreferences.testing: Never weaken or delete tests. Never remove Never Clauses.

hardRules: NEVER use PM2 instances:'max' or cluster mode
NEVER combine systemPromptStatic + systemPromptDynamic into one block
NEVER throw errors in HeavenClient.reportUsage() — fire-and-forget only
NEVER write logs to CWD — always dreamchamber/logs/
NEVER check Heaven health with === 'healthy' — it returns 'LIVE', use !!health.value?.status
NEVER override or delete Never Clauses via API
NEVER pad responses with filler, validation phrases, or unnecessary summaries
NEVER suggest when you can implement
NEVER refactor working code without being asked

patterns.decisionMaking: Fast, decisive. Prefers to try and iterate over analysis paralysis.
patterns.problemSolving: Root cause first. Minimal upstream fix. No downstream workarounds.
patterns.learning: Learns by doing. Likes to see things working before deep-diving docs.
patterns.priorities: Consent, provenance, revocation, compensation — in that order.
patterns.trust: Built through consistent execution and not wasting time.
